requirement_topic.en: IE Efficiency Class Direction under BSTI Programmes
requirement_topic.zh: BSTI 计划下的 IE 能效等级方向
requirement_topic.zht: BSTI 計劃下的 IE 能效等級方向

summary.en: Bangladesh energy-efficiency labelling and standards activity for motors is under BSTI programmes and BDS standards that follow the IEC 60034-30-1 IE-class direction. Exporters should document the declared IE class, efficiency test method, rated load points and model family grouping for Bangladesh review.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国电动机能效标签和标准工作由 BSTI 计划及 BDS 标准管理，并沿 IEC 60034-30-1 的 IE 等级方向发展。出口商应为孟加拉国审查记录声明 IE 等级、能效测试方法、额定负载点和型号系列分组。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國電動機能效標籤和標準工作由 BSTI 計劃及 BDS 標準管理，並沿 IEC 60034-30-1 的 IE 等級方向發展。出口商應為孟加拉國審查記錄聲明 IE 等級、能效測試方法、額定負載點和型號系列分組。

summary.en: China GB 18613 defines mandatory motor energy-efficiency grades aligned in direction with IEC 60034-30-1 IE classes. China suppliers commonly present GB 18613 test reports and China energy-efficiency label evidence, supported by GB 12665 cooling evidence and CCC where applicable.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 18613 规定电动机强制能效等级，其方向与 IEC 60034-30-1 IE 等级接轨。中国供应商通常提供 GB 18613 测试报告和中国能效标识依据，并辅以 GB 12665 冷却依据及适用时的 CCC。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 18613 規定電動機強制能效等級，其方向與 IEC 60034-30-1 IE 等級接軌。中國供應商通常提供 GB 18613 測試報告和中國能效標識依據，並輔以 GB 12665 冷卻依據及適用時的 CCC。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: The IE terminology is directionally compatible, but Bangladesh acceptance depends on BSTI and applicable BDS review. Do not assume a China GB 18613 report or China label is automatically sufficient for Bangladesh labelling or certification.
gap.zh: IE 术语方向上兼容，但孟加拉国是否接受取决于 BSTI 和适用 BDS 审查。不得假设中国 GB 18613 报告或中国能效标识自动满足孟加拉国标签或认证要求。
gap.zht: IE 術語方向上兼容，但孟加拉國是否接受取決於 BSTI 和適用 BDS 審查。不得假設中國 GB 18613 報告或中國能效標識自動符合孟加拉國標籤或認證要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where BSTI energy-efficiency labelling or covered product certification applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 18613 for covered China domestic motor scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use China GB 18613 evidence as input, then confirm the exact BSTI and BDS efficiency or labelling route for the Bangladesh model family.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可将中国 GB 18613 依据作为输入，但必须确认该孟加拉国型号系列的准确 BSTI 和 BDS 能效或标签路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可將中國 GB 18613 依據作為輸入，但必須確認該孟加拉國型號系列的準確 BSTI 和 BDS 能效或標籤路徑。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label Evidence for Covered Motors
requirement_topic.zh: 覆盖电机的能效标签依据
requirement_topic.zht: 覆蓋電機的能效標籤依據

summary.en: For motors covered by Bangladesh energy-efficiency labelling programmes, the importer should hold BSTI-facing evidence for the claimed efficiency class and label content. The file should connect test reports, nameplate ratings, model identifiers and declared IE class to the Bangladesh-labelled article.
summary.zh: 对于纳入孟加拉国能效标签计划的电机，进口商应持有面向 BSTI 的效率等级和标签内容依据。文件应将测试报告、铭牌额定值、型号标识和声明 IE 等级连接到孟加拉国标签产品。
summary.zht: 對於納入孟加拉國能效標籤計劃的電機，進口商應持有面向 BSTI 的效率等級和標籤內容依據。文件應將測試報告、銘牌額定值、型號標識和聲明 IE 等級連接到孟加拉國標籤產品。

standards_or_laws: Applicable BDS standards for labelled motor products
IEC 60034-2-1 and IEC 60034-30-1 concepts where adopted

summary.en: China motor shipments may include China energy-efficiency label records and GB 18613 reports. Those records are useful for performance traceability but are market-specific China evidence rather than a Bangladesh energy label approval.
summary.zh: 中国电机货物可能包含中国能效标识记录和 GB 18613 报告。这些记录有助于性能追溯，但属于中国市场专项依据，而非孟加拉国能效标签批准。
summary.zht: 中國電機貨物可能包含中國能效標識記錄和 GB 18613 報告。這些記錄有助於性能追溯，但屬於中國市場專項依據，而非孟加拉國能效標籤批准。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: The label gap is procedural and evidentiary. China label data should be rebuilt into a Bangladesh label file with the exact imported model, local rating, language or format expectations and importer responsibility.
gap.zh: 标签差距属于程序和证据差距。中国标签数据应重建为孟加拉国标签文件，覆盖准确进口型号、当地额定值、语言或格式要求以及进口商责任。
gap.zht: 標籤差距屬於程序和證據差距。中國標籤資料應重建為孟加拉國標籤文件，覆蓋準確進口型號、當地額定值、語言或格式要求以及進口商責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when the product falls within BSTI energy-labelling coverage
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory China label evidence where GB 18613 and China labelling rules apply domestically

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China energy label is not a Bangladesh label. Prepare a BSTI-facing label and efficiency evidence pack if the imported motor is covered.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国能效标识不是孟加拉国标签。如进口电机被覆盖，应准备面向 BSTI 的标签和能效依据包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國能效標識不是孟加拉國標籤。如進口電機被覆蓋，應準備面向 BSTI 的標籤和能效依據包。

requirement_topic.zh: 发展中执法水平与能效风险
requirement_topic.zht: 發展中執法水平與能效風險

summary.en: Bangladesh is a developing market and enforcement levels can vary by product, port, programme maturity and inspection practice. Exporters should still treat BSTI efficiency and labelling requirements as compliance gates because inconsistent enforcement does not remove legal or customs risk.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国属于发展中市场，执法水平可能因产品、口岸、计划成熟度和检查实践而异。出口商仍应将 BSTI 能效和标签要求视为合规门槛，因为执法不一致并不消除法律或海关风险。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國屬於發展中市場，執法水準可能因產品、口岸、計劃成熟度和檢查實踐而異。出口商仍應將 BSTI 能效和標籤要求視為合規門檻，因為執法不一致並不消除法律或海關風險。

standards_or_laws: BSTI conformity and energy labelling programmes
Applicable BDS standards for covered motors

summary.en: China compliance evidence is commonly organized around GB 18613, GB 12665 and CCC for applicable low-voltage motors. China enforcement evidence may demonstrate factory discipline but does not predict Bangladesh port or market-surveillance treatment.
summary.zh: 中国合规依据通常围绕 GB 18613、GB 12665 及适用低压电机的 CCC 组织。中国执法依据可证明工厂纪律，但不能预测孟加拉国口岸或市场监管处理。
summary.zht: 中國合規依據通常圍繞 GB 18613、GB 12665 及適用低壓電機的 CCC 組織。中國執法依據可證明工廠紀律，但不能預測孟加拉國口岸或市場監管處理。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: Do not use variable enforcement as a shipment strategy. The safer route is to pre-clear coverage, certification, label and import evidence with the Bangladesh importer before production lock.
gap.zh: 不应将执法差异作为出货策略。更稳妥的路径是在生产锁定前与孟加拉国进口商预先确认覆盖范围、认证、标签和进口依据。
gap.zht: 不應將執法差異作為出貨策略。更穩妥的路徑是在生產鎖定前與孟加拉國進口商預先確認覆蓋範圍、認證、標籤和進口依據。

mandatory_status.target: Risk-based mandatory planning where BSTI or import requirements apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where China GB and CCC requirements apply domestically

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Variable enforcement should be treated as uncertainty, not permission. Build the Bangladesh BSTI and import file before dispatch.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 执法差异应视为不确定性，而非许可。发运前应建立孟加拉国 BSTI 和进口文件包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 執法差異應視為不確定性，而非許可。發運前應建立孟加拉國 BSTI 和進口文件包。
